jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at ICAT
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
